# VERIFRAX Primitive Related-Primitives Block

Use this block in every standalone primitive README.

## Related primitives

The Verifrax primitive layer consists of eight irreversible primitives.

- originseal — origin fixation
- archicustos — custody preservation
- kairoclasp — time boundary fixation
- limenward — boundary enforcement
- validexor — verification judgment
- attestorium — witness attestation
- irrevocull — irreversible judgment
- guillotine — terminal termination

Repositories:

- https://github.com/Verifrax/originseal
- https://github.com/Verifrax/archicustos
- https://github.com/Verifrax/kairoclasp
- https://github.com/Verifrax/limenward
- https://github.com/Verifrax/validexor
- https://github.com/Verifrax/attestorium
- https://github.com/Verifrax/irrevocull
- https://github.com/Verifrax/guillotine

## Rules

1. Every primitive README must reference the full primitive layer.
2. The primitive order must remain canonical.
3. The primitive names must remain lowercase and exact.
4. Cross-references must point to the standalone primitive repositories.
5. No README may reorder or selectively omit primitives from this list.
